description: This file is an HTML webpage that serves as a visual interface for a database viewer application. It provides UI components such as database list, table list, data display table, and controls for refreshing data. The embedded JavaScript handles dynamic loading of databases, tables, and table data from API endpoints, as well as interactions like expanding cell contents.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches the list of databases from the server and updates the UI.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the database list, reloading data from the server.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Toggles the display of table list for a selected database.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Loads tables for a selected database and updates the UI.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Loads data for a selected table and renders it in the UI.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Constructs and inserts the HTML for the data table from fetched data.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Renders individual cell content, handling nulls, objects, and long strings.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content for long strings or objects.
